name: lumen-platform-monorepo
description: Lumen ecosystem including compiler, CLI, IDE, and Copilot

scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd website && npm run dev"
scripts.build: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../website && npm run build
scripts.start: concurrently "cd backend && npm run start" "cd website && npm run start"
scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../website && npm install
